topIngredients.name: Ceramides (1, 3, 6-II)
topIngredients.benefit: Cleanses without stripping the all-important skin barrier

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Maintains hydration levels even while cleansing

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Gentle humectant that leaves skin soft, not tight

verdict: CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser is the benchmark facial cleanser for good reason. Its ceramide-enriched formula is one of the only cleansers that actively supports the skin barrier while removing impurities. Outstanding for all skin types.
